title: philadelphia fed / regional survey / nonmanufacturing | Data Release Other | Nonmanufacturing Business Outlook Survey (NBOS) - March 2026...
summary: The Philadelphia Fed's Nonmanufacturing Business Outlook Survey for March 2026 shows nonmanufacturing activity in the region declined, with the firm-level general activity index falling 14 points to -8.3 (first negative reading since June) and regional activity index dropping to -23.9 (lowest since May). Employment indexes turned negative for both full-time (-11.3) and part-time (-7.2) positions, while price indexes suggest continued but moderating price increases.
